meta_title: For Students: passive income to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Passive Income to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome the no portfolio trap. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your first app.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no portfolio' barrier by building niche, automated micro-SaaS tools. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can ship functional products in days. These projects serve as both a revenue stream and a high-impact technical showcase for future employers.
content.intro:
The job market is a gauntlet, and your degree is just a paper shield. When you walk into an interview with nothing but theoretical knowledge, you are just another resume in the pile. You need to stop asking for opportunities and start building the proof that you are already an engineer.

Passive income isn't just about money; it’s about building a living, breathing product that solves a real-world problem. This isn't a tutorial; it's a blueprint for transformation. We are going to bypass the 'tutorial hell' phase and get you to ship a product that showcases your technical chops and entrepreneurial grit.

steps.title: Define Your Micro-Niche
steps.description: Identify a specific, boring problem in a niche community. The goal is to build a tool that solves one thing perfectly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a product strategist. Brainstorm 5 micro-SaaS ideas for niche communities (e.g., Notion users, Shopify store owners) that can be built in under 48 hours. Focus on subscription-based value.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review these 5 micro-SaaS ideas and recommend the most viable one for a student portfolio.'

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate your boilerplate, ensuring best practices like clean architecture and environment security.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js and Supabase project structure for a micro-SaaS. Include user authentication, a payment gateway integration using Stripe, and a dashboard layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the project structure generated by Antigravity and set up the local environment variables.'

steps.title: Build the Core Value Loop
steps.description: Implement the primary feature that delivers the 'Aha!' moment. This is what employers will test.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the logic for a custom API route that processes user input and returns a structured output using the OpenAI SDK. Ensure error handling and rate limiting are included.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement the core API logic and add unit tests for the data processing function.'

steps.title: Integrate Monetization
steps.description: Connect Stripe to your app. This proves you can handle real-world payments and secure user data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler to manage successful checkout sessions and update the user's subscription status in the Supabase database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate the Stripe webhook handler and test the payment flow using the Stripe CLI.'

steps.title: Deploy and Portfolio-ize
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel and write the README that explains your technical decisions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a compelling README for my GitHub repository. Highlight the stack, the problem solved, and the technical challenges overcome during development.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Update the project documentation and finalize deployment configurations for Vercel.'

pro_tips: Focus on 'boring' problems; they have the highest willingness to pay and the least competition.
Always include a 'Technical Challenges' section in your README to show you can debug, not just build.
Use Supabase RLS policies to demonstrate security expertise, which is a major red flag if ignored.
Keep your UI minimal; employers prefer clean, functional interfaces over flashy, broken designs.
Record a 60-second Loom demo of your app to include in your LinkedIn profile; it increases interview conversion by 300%.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, share your project on X (formerly Twitter) and LinkedIn, tag the communities you built for, and start collecting user feedback to iterate on your next feature.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a student waiting for permission to build; you are an AI Builder with a live product in the market. Every line of code you wrote is a testament to your capability. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
